title: Database Management System (DBMS) Architecture Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the core components of a DBMS and how they interact to manage a database and serve user requests.
relationships: User sends queries/data requests to DBMS
DBMS uses Query Processor to interpret and execute queries
DBMS uses Storage Manager to read/write data to the Database
DBMS uses Transaction Manager to ensure ACID properties
Database Schema defines the structure of the data in the Database
